description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Staged commit that runs on push to the auto branch. The workflow has two jobs: linux-distros and macos. The linux-distros job uses a matrix strategy to test on multiple Linux distributions, compilers, and layers. It runs on an ubuntu-22.04 environment, uses a container image based on the matrix os, and checks out sources, sets up ccache, runs test-builds, and publishes build logs. The macos job runs on a macos-14 environment, installs prerequisite packages, checks out sources, runs test-builds with specific environment variables, and publishes build logs.
